User.title: User Profile
User.description: User profile with preferences and Jarvis personalizations.

preferredName.description: How Jarvis refers to you (e.g. Tony, Mr. Stark)

aiSummary.description: Jarvis' learned memory of user's habits, favorites, and preference records

Contact.title: Contact Details
Contact.description: User contacts list for calls and messaging integrations.

contactId.description: Unique contact ID under the user subcollection

name.description: Contact display name (e.g. Mom, Dad, Pepper)

whatsappNumber.description: WhatsApp number for quick chat action

name.description: Device name (e.g. Arch Reactor, Living Room Lights, Lab AC)

status.description: Basic state (on, off, locked, unlocked, open)

value.description: Detailed attribute state (e.g., 72 degrees, Blue sky, 85%)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when device state was changed

Interaction.title: Interaction Log
Interaction.description: Commands logs for persistent memory analysis.

command.description: Voice or text command sent to Jarvis

users/{userId}.description: Owner user settings and AI summaries

users/{userId}/contacts/{contactId}.description: Contacts for simulated speech actions (make calls, text)

users/{userId}/interactions/{interaction.description: Past dialogues processed by the server-side memory module
